name: MARA Holdings, Inc.
description: MARA Holdings, Inc. is a digital asset technology company that operates at the intersection of energy, compute, and digital capital. Headquartered in Florida, the company focuses on building infrastructure to support high-performance computing and artificial intelligence, while also engaging in large-scale Bitcoin mining operations. By leveraging strategic partnerships, joint ventures, and energy-efficient technologies, MARA aims to stabilize power grids and provide scalable solutions for the evolving digital economy. The company is committed to advancing global energy systems through innovative data center operations and sustainable infrastructure development.
